creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: Move VLC to 0.9.9a and revamp OPTIONS to allow for stream server only
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133534

1) What do you think about adding GNOMEVFS option?

+               GNOMEVFS "Gnome VFS support" On \

2) Are you sure this is correct?

.if defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
USE_GETTEXT=    yes
CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-nls
.endif

3) Fails WITH_DIRAC:

http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/vlc-dirac-0.9.9.a%2c3.log

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
